label.description: Amber uppercase micro-label above the heading (e.g. 'Before it's gone').

body_html.description:
Plain text with optional inline emphasis. Only
, , and tags are allowed. The InlineHtmlSchema Zod validator that originally enforced this lived in lib/content-schemas.ts and was removed in the audit cleanup (shipped as M1c but never wired). Whitelist enforcement is operator-trust today; re-add when a content-validation pass consumes it.

usage_notes: Amber-background 2-col band. Left cell: short amber label + big heading. Right cell: a paragraph with inline emphasis. This is the only component in the LeadSource design system that accepts inline HTML in body copy.
